_comment: TRUE POSITIVE — SP-102003: Process Hollowing / Injection into critical process (T1055.012)
scenario: Malware injects code into a legitimate Windows process (svchost.exe) to hide its execution and evade AV detection
why_tp: CreateRemoteThread from user-writable AppData path into svchost.exe — textbook injection
GrantedAccess 0x1F3FFF = PROCESS_ALL_ACCESS — full memory write capability
Source binary updater.exe in Temp — not a signed system binary
StartAddress 0x7FFE... suggests injected shellcode or reflective DLL
analyst_action: Dump the memory of svchost.exe PID 1452 for forensic analysis
Check network connections from svchost.exe PID 1452 post-injection
Isolate WORKSTATION-SALES-07 — injected svchost.exe may be C2 beaconing
